message:
fix: clean stale dolt-server.port files on server start (gt-t642)

When gt dolt start/restart brings up the server, walk the town root and
fix any dolt-server.port files or metadata.json entries that point to a
different port than the newly started server. This prevents bd from
connecting to a dead or rogue local Dolt instance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
